case_title: FERMIN CARO DEL CASTILLO et al VS. JOHN S. UETZ et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANTS WAIVED SERVICE ON PLAINTIFFS CLAIM. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
